title: task
description: Create Python Protocol classes that mirror Rust traits and C vtables. Interfaces: RadioDriver, LinkLayer, FrameParser, Signer/Verifier, ReplayWindow. These formalize the cross-implementation contract and enable mypy to catch parity bugs.
close_reason: Fixed: Created python/src/lichen/interface/protocols.py with 15 Protocol classes mirroring Rust traits and C vtables: RadioDriver, FrameParser, LinkLayerTx, LinkLayerRx, RxResult, Signer, Verifier, ReplayWindow, ReplayProtector, Identity, PeerIdentity, Clock, Rng, NonVolatile. All are runtime_checkable and documented with cross-implementation references.
